text: Introduction to Machine learning Machine learning is about extracting knowledge from data. It is a research field at instruction of aesthetic, artificial intelligence and computer science, and it is also known as a predictive analytics or aesthetical learning. So the application of machine learning method either as in recent year become in everyday life from automatic recommendation of which movies to watch to what food to order or which product to buy, to personalized online radio and recognize your friends in your photos. Many modern website devices have many learning algorithms. Learning algorithm and their or when you look at complex website like Facebook, Amazon or Netflix, it is very likely that every part of site contain multiple machine learning models. Why Python? Python has become the. Become the general purpose programming language with the easy of use domain specific scripting language like Matlab or R. Python has libraries from data loading, visualization, static natural language processing like images processing and more.
